title: Quotinator Source Manifest
description: Ordered list of source files to import from a data/sources/ directory. Files are imported in the order listed; files not listed are appended alphabetically after listed entries.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference — used by editors for validation and IntelliSense.

file.description: Filename relative to this manifest's directory (e.g. 'vilaboim_movie-quotes.json').

name.description: Human-readable source identifier shown in the import log and management UI (e.g. 'vilaboim/movie-quotes').
